official_name: Healthcare Information and Management Systems Society
notes: Global health-IT professional association. Publishes the HIMSS Electronic Medical Record Adoption Model (EMRAM), Continua Personal Connected Health Alliance design guidelines (Continua merged into HIMSS), the Cybersecurity Survey, and certification programmes. Paid materials.

match_nodes.description: HIMSS Electronic Medical Record Adoption Model (EMRAM)

data.official_name: HIMSS EMRAM - Electronic Medical Record Adoption Model
data.notes: Paid. Hospital EMR-maturity model with security/privacy criteria at higher stages.

Members-only / paid. Personal Connected Health Alliance interoperability guidelines covering health-IoT device-to-system security. Continua merged into HIMSS (formerly the Personal Connected Health Alliance, PCHA).
